name: Chinese Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Small red or green pepper, seeded
1 tsp Grated, pared fresh ginger root
2 tsp Rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Clean the mushrooms and remove any stems.
3. Mix pork with grated ginger, rice wine, soy sauce, hoi sin sauce, cornstarch, chopped green onions, celery, chestnuts, and egg white until well combined.
4. Stuff the mixture into each mushroom cap.
5. Place stuffed mushrooms in a baking dish.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the mushrooms are tender and golden brown.
7. Serve hot.
